info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud Goods Tech proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud Goods Tech API

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the ClassifyCommodity operation for product categorization. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=ClassifyCommodity and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For local files or OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

CategoryId.description:
The category ID.  
> You can view the category IDs and category names supported by this API in the [category.txt](https://viapi-demo.oss-cn-shanghai.aliyuncs.com/doc/category.txt?spm=a2c4g.11186623.2.16.2c1d687bEDtrmY&file=category.txt) file.

CategoryName.description:
The category name.  
> You can view the category IDs and category names supported by this API in the [category.txt](https://viapi-demo.oss-cn-shanghai.aliyuncs.com/doc/category.txt?spm=a2c4g.11186623.2.16.2c1d687bEDtrmY&file=category.txt) file.

Score.description: The matching degree of the category ID, which is greater than 0 and less than or equal to 1.
